title: pgstat — Top Queries Detail
description: Instance Detail dashboard'undaki Top 20 Sorgu tablosundan tiklanarak acilir. Time range + instance ile filtreli, sorgu bazli derin analiz: per-query trend, top N by farkli metrikler, db dagilimi.

list.name: instance
list.query: select display_name as __text, instance_pk as __value from control.instance_inventory where is_active order by display_name
list.label: Instance

list.name: metric
list.label: Sırala
list.query: total_exec_time_ms_delta : Toplam Exec Süresi,calls_delta : Çağrı Sayısı,wal_bytes_delta : WAL Üretimi,shared_blks_read_delta : Disk Read,rows_delta : Dönen Satır

targets.rawSql: select coalesce(sum(calls_delta), 0) as value from fact.pgss_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)
select coalesce(sum(total_exec_time_ms_delta), 0) as value from fact.pgss_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)
select coalesce(sum(wal_bytes_delta), 0) as value from fact.pgss_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)
select count(distinct statement_series_id) as value from fact.pgss_delta where instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(sample_ts)

panels.title: Top 10 Sorgu — zaman içinde ($metric)
panels.description: Seçtiğin metrikte en yoğun 10 sorgunun zaman içindeki seyri. Bir spike → sorumlu sorguyu görmek için.

targets.rawSql: with top10 as (select ss.statement_series_id, sum(d.${metric}) as total from fact.pgss_delta d join dim.statement_series ss on ss.statement_series_id = d.statement_series_id where d.instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) group by ss.statement_series_id order by total desc limit 10) select $__timeGroup(d.sample_ts, $interval) as time, left(coalesce(qt.query_text, ss.queryid::text), 60) as metric, sum(d.${metric}) as value from fact.pgss_delta d join dim.statement_series ss on ss.statement_series_id = d.statement_series_id left join dim.query_text qt on qt.query_text_id = ss.query_text_id where d.instance_pk = $instance and ss.statement_series_id in (select statement_series_id from top10) and $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) group by 1, ss.statement_series_id, qt.query_text, ss.queryid order by 1

select coalesce(dbr.datname, 'unknown') as metric, sum(d.${metric}) as value from fact.pgss_delta d join dim.statement_series ss on ss.statement_series_id = d.statement_series_id left join dim.database_ref dbr on dbr.instance_pk = ss.instance_pk and dbr.dbid = ss.dbid where d.instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) group by dbr.datname order by value desc

select coalesce(rr.rolname, 'unknown') as metric, sum(d.${metric}) as value from fact.pgss_delta d join dim.statement_series ss on ss.statement_series_id = d.statement_series_id left join dim.role_ref rr on rr.instance_pk = ss.instance_pk and rr.userid = ss.userid where d.instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) group by rr.rolname order by value desc

select left(coalesce(qt.query_text, '?'), 300) as query, dbr.datname as db, rr.rolname as "user", sum(d.calls_delta) as calls, round(sum(d.total_exec_time_ms_delta)::numeric, 0) as total_ms, round((sum(d.total_exec_time_ms_delta)::numeric / nullif(sum(d.calls_delta), 0))::numeric, 2) as mean_ms, sum(d.rows_delta) as rows, sum(d.shared_blks_read_delta) * 8192 as disk_read, sum(d.shared_blks_hit_delta) * 8192 as shared_hit, sum(d.temp_blks_written_delta) * 8192 as temp_bytes, sum(d.wal_bytes_delta) as wal_bytes, round((100.0 * sum(d.shared_blks_hit_delta) / nullif(sum(d.shared_blks_hit_delta + d.shared_blks_read_delta), 0))::numeric, 1) as cache_hit_pct from fact.pgss_delta d join dim.statement_series ss on ss.statement_series_id = d.statement_series_id left join dim.query_text qt on qt.query_text_id = ss.query_text_id left join dim.database_ref dbr on dbr.instance_pk = ss.instance_pk and dbr.dbid = ss.dbid left join dim.role_ref rr on rr.instance_pk = ss.instance_pk and rr.userid = ss.userid where d.instance_pk = $instance and $__timeFilter(d.sample_ts) group by 1, 2, 3 order by sum(d.${metric}) desc nulls last limit 50
